free_text: Gamma spectrometers developed on the basis of
ultra-pure  semiconductor detectors from Canberra and
compared to a NaI(Tl) detector 3'x 3' size. The
energy resolution of spectrometers was 1.2 keV on
the 343 keV g-line of 175Hf and 1.8-2.0 keV on the
The weighted-average reaction cross sections were
continuously distributed from the boundary energy
EN-MAX and therefore only integrated cross sections
are in fact measured in experiments.
Data were compiled at the Russia MSU SINP
